behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, function/class names (_compute_server_args, _EXTERNAL_ENGINE_SKIP_CHECK_FIELDS, _get_metrics_router_addr, init_wandb_secondary, GenerateState, dp_rank_context), and literals (enable_metrics, follow_bootstrap_room, round_robin, sglang_enable_metrics, router_addr, contextmanager) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction essentially dictates the fix: 'set enable_metrics=True in the server kwargs', 'add enable_metrics to _EXTERNAL_ENGINE_SKIP_CHECK_FIELDS', 'use follow_bootstrap_room instead of round_robin', 'remove from contextlib import contextmanager', etc. — leaving minimal reasoning.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral outcomes (dict key values, list membership, absence of strings like sglang_enable_metrics, method removal) rather than specific variable names or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use ast parsing to inspect structure (dict values, list elements, class methods) and run ruff subprocess, not merely substring checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each test asserts a specific structural fix (enable_metrics=True constant, follow_bootstrap_room literal, removal of dp_rank_context method) that a stub cannot satisfy without performing the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each required behavior in instruction (enable_metrics in kwargs & allowlist, load_balance_method change, flag gating removal in two files, dp_rank_context/dp_counts/dp_rank/contextmanager removal) has a corresponding test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings mapping 1:1 to checks in eval_manifest.yaml.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code refactoring, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names exact symbols and values to change ('set enable_metrics=True', 'use follow_bootstrap_room instead of round_robin', 'remove from contextlib import contextmanager'), removing localization challenge.
